title: Reliance Industries Consulting Pvt Ltd is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Reliance Industries Consulting Pvt Ltd is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Quality Control Engineer with drive and ambition, Reliance Industries Consulting Pvt Ltd in Patna is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Reliance Industries Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Reliance Industries Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Reliance Industries Consulting Pvt Ltd!
